[88:15]And I think it's remarkable that we have reached a point

[88:17]in our country when that is even possible.

[88:21]Because for so long, like I said, for 10 years,

[88:25]you literally did not have the freedom of conscience.

[88:28]You couldn't think these things.

[88:31]You could not speak these things aloud.

[88:33]It wasn't possible.

[88:34]You would get banned from everything.

[88:36]And if that didn't work, you got fired from your job.

[88:40]And if that didn't work, they banned you from banks.

[88:43]That's what happened to me. And so finally we are in a time where I'm on a platform. I can make

[88:51]a living and people are willing to hear me out and maybe they like it and maybe they don't,

[88:55]but that's a huge victory in itself. And by the way, people are loving it.

[89:00]The reason this is happening, by the way, is because I'm popular now.

[89:10]And I don't know how I feel about that.

[89:12]I'm a pretty private person.

[89:13]I'm a pretty isolated person.

[89:16]But let me just tell you, all of this,

[89:19]all the freak out, the so-called backlash,

[89:22]that is on Twitter.

[89:23]That is not real life.

[89:24]If you go outside and touch grass,

[89:26]you will find men, you will find women,

[89:28]you will find young people, you will find old people.

[89:31]They watch my stuff on Instagram and they like it.

[89:34]They think it's funny.

[89:36]They agree with it.

[89:38]Everywhere I go, it used to be the case,

[89:40]I would get recognized maybe one out of a hundred times.

[89:43]Now it's like every other time I leave the house

[89:45]and it's all positive.

[89:47]I get people high-fiving me, taking pictures of me,

[89:50]keep doing what you're doing.

[89:51]I love what you're saying, America's not free.

[89:54]And by the way, it's not what they say it is.

[89:58]They all, and by they, I mean the Israel lobby,

[90:01]they say, oh, it's loser, disgruntled white men

[90:04]who we need to save from themselves.

[90:07]You're wrong.

[90:09]When I was in DC, it was a Liberian immigrant.

[90:13]It was some Filipino looking guy who was at a restaurant.

[90:17]It is also a lot of young white men,

[90:19]but a lot of them, they're normal.

[90:21]They're good looking, they're tall.

[90:23]That's all of them.

[90:25]And whenever I go out, I love what you're doing. It's America first. Keep spreading the word about Israel, all of them in all colors, mostly men, less so women, young and old. They love what I'm saying. And the reason I say that, I don't want to ramble on too much here.

[90:44]But the reason I say that is because they're trying to demoralize you.

[90:47]And this is the name of the game.

[90:49]It's all about the frame.

[90:51]It's all about how the table is set.

[90:53]And right now, there is a concerted effort to distort your perception.

[90:59]and I don't know what's going on with the algorithm on X,

[91:03]but my entire timeline for the past week,

[91:06]it's all people I don't follow.

[91:08]It's all people that have like 10,000 followers

[91:11]and they all have the yellow ribbon in their bio.

[91:14]They all have the Israeli flag in their bio

[91:16]and they're all hand wringing and crying

[91:19]and freaking out about the interview.

[91:23]And that is simply not how it is being perceived.

[91:27]You've got

[91:28]probably combined 50 million views on the interview,

[91:33]universal acclaim.

[91:34]And the people that don't love it,

[91:36]they're saying, I don't get what the big deal is.

[91:38]It seemed fine to me.

[91:41]It seemed moderate and tame and mild.

[91:44]And honestly, I agree with 90% of it.

[91:47]But there's a deliberate effort right now

[91:49]to distort that perception and say,

[91:52]no, everyone's scared.

[91:53]Everyone's freaking out.

[91:54]Everyone hates this.

[91:55]That's not reality.

[91:58]That is a concerted smear campaign and immediate campaign because they know they're on the

[92:04]back foot right now.

[92:15]this is where it all started.

[92:20]And, like I said, the interview blew up.

[92:23]It's one of the biggest interviews he's ever done.

[92:25]And he loved it.

[92:27]He texted me.

[92:28]He said, I thought it was excellent.

[92:29]I said, thank you so much for being fair.

[92:32]I thought it was great too.

[92:34]And we loved it.

[92:35]And everyone I knew loved it.

[93:13]And then on Thursday, the president of the Heritage Foundation, Kevin Roberts, released

[93:18]a video about this.

[93:20]There were some rumors that Heritage was distancing themselves from Tucker Carlson.

[93:25]And their president, Kevin Roberts, came out to set the record straight.

[93:29]And he released a video statement.

[93:32]And I thought the video statement was totally on point.

[93:35]I thought it was very courageous.

[93:39]nor do I think that any reasonable person would disagree with anything in it.

[93:45]In the video, he said very simply, he said, contrary to popular belief, he said,

[93:53]we are not distancing ourselves from Tucker Carlson. He said, and the reason being is we

[93:58]don't agree with cancel culture. He said, our job is not to police the conscience of other Christians,

[94:05]He said, and I also don't believe that we must reflexively and automatically support

[94:12]a foreign country like Israel.

[94:14]He said, we have a right to criticize Israel, actually.

[94:18]In addition, he said, our principles, the pillars of our movement, are Christ is king,

[94:25]America first, and free speech.

[94:28]He said, and while I don't agree with everything Nick Fuente says, and I find his views abhorrent,

[94:33]He said, Nick Fuentes should not be canceled and we should debate him rather than censoring

[94:38]him.

[94:40]That was the video.

[94:43]Now, this was really important because Heritage Foundation is maybe the most important think

[94:49]tank in the conservative movement.

[94:51]They've been around forever and they're considered the standard bearer of the Reagan

[94:59]So for the president of heritage, representing this all important institution to say these

[95:03]things was a really big deal.

[95:05]Because the message was, Tucker Carlson is not gonna be kicked out of the big tent.

[95:11]Tucker Carlson will not be canceled, he's not going anywhere.

[95:14]The canceled culture mob will not lynch him.

[95:26]somehow was worse than the reaction to Tucker. All of a sudden, the donors that put up the

[95:39]out. The anti-Semitism brigade, the coalition for Jews and whatever against anti-Semitism,
